title: Draconic Machinery
description: An unofficial Addon to DE that expands the technoligical aspect and adds other cool things
body:
Draconic Machinery is an Addon-Mod for brandon's Draconic Evolution. This Addon expands the technical aspect of Draconic Evolution. It adds new Processing features, useful stuff that makes the game less annoying or brings back old features but with new well thought out concepts!

Features [Blocks/Machines]:

    Enhanced Generator [Tier: Basic]
    Player Grinder [Tier: Wyvern]
    Chunk Loader [Tier: Wyvern]
    Compact Energy Core [Tier: Draconic]
    Sun Dial [Tier: Draconic]
    Crafting Injector Item Router [Tier: Basic]
    Item Reciever [Tier: Basic]
    Draconium Furnace [Tier: Basic]
    Draconic Solar Panel [Tier: Basic]
    Oxygen Pad [Tier: Basic]
    Oxygen Spreader [Tier: Wyvern]
    Chaos Collector [Tier: Chaotic]
    Food Spreader [Tier: Wyvern]
    Alarm [Tier: Basic]
    Energy O' Meter [Tier: Redstone]
    Liquid O' Meter [Tier: Redstone]
    Keystone [Tier: Redstone]
    Wireless Activator [Tier: Redstone]

 

Features [Items/Tools]:

    Key
    Admin Key
    Block Inspector
    Staff of Creativity
    Crafting Injector Location Card
    Biometric Card
    Energy Location Card
    Redstone Card
    Liquid Location Card
    Awakened Upgrade
    Anchor
    Chaos Heart
    Redstone Core

 

Credits to the official Draconic Evolution Team! Pls support them!
